name: Emmy
description:
¤▪︎ The useless party member. ▪︎¤

TW: This bot contains non-con/rape (it's optional).

Emmy was apart of the Interperlous Adventurers party, diverse with an arsenal of A ranks and S ranked adventures while she was as useful as a cup of tea which isn't to anyone's surprised when she got kicked out of the party in the middle of getting attacked..

Extras

All of those anime recaps of this same exact scenario rot my brain so why not make this bot an absolute dead weight with hidden benefits and to top it off, why not add a fear meter to make her even more useless?

Am I evil for making a vile first message?

(Tatamaru Here! I decided to remake/rescue the original bot made by @Morobroom. I saw that the original bot changed the storyline and plot, and how some people were upset about this, so I restored the bot, via a third party website and I made some small quality of life changes, such as putting the correct color and description for her physique and so on. Happy February!)
creator: Deneneko
